'''vomachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:atemporal|atemporal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:atemporal|atemporal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vomachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vomachithi|vomachithi]] || [[word:vomachiji|vomachiji]] || [[word:vomachishi|vomachishi]] || [[word:vomachiki|vomachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vomachuthuthu|vomachuthuthu]] || [[word:vomachujuju|vomachujuju]] || [[word:vomachushushu|vomachushushu]] || [[word:vomachukuku|vomachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vomachuthu|vomachuthu]] || [[word:vomachuju|vomachuju]] || [[word:vomachushu|vomachushu]] || [[word:vomachuku|vomachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vomachufthuf|vomachufthuf]] || [[word:vomachufjuf|vomachufjuf]] || [[word:vomachufshuf|vomachufshuf]] || [[word:vomachufkuf|vomachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vomachethe|vomachethe]] || [[word:vomacheje|vomacheje]] || [[word:vomacheshe|vomacheshe]] || [[word:vomacheke|vomacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vomachothotho|vomachothotho]] || [[word:vomachojojo|vomachojojo]] || [[word:vomachoshosho|vomachoshosho]] || [[word:vomachokoko|vomachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vomachotho|vomachotho]] || [[word:vomachojo|vomachojo]] || [[word:vomachosho|vomachosho]] || [[word:vomachoko|vomachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vomachofthof|vomachofthof]] || [[word:vomachofjof|vomachofjof]] || [[word:vomachofshof|vomachofshof]] || [[word:vomachofkof|vomachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfthĂŻf|vomachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfjĂŻf|vomachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfshĂŻf|vomachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfkĂŻf|vomachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|vomachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|vomachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|vomachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|vomachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfthĂŻf|vomachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfjĂŻf|vomachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfshĂŻf|vomachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfkĂŻf|vomachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfthĂŻf|vomachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfjĂŻf|vomachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfshĂŻf|vomachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vomachĂŻfkĂŻf|vomachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vomachĂŠthĂŠ|vomachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:vomachĂŠjĂŠ|vomachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:vomachĂŠshĂŠ|vomachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:vomachĂŠkĂŠ|vomachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vomachathatha|vomachathatha]] || [[word:vomachajaja|vomachajaja]] || [[word:vomachashasha|vomachashasha]] || [[word:vomachakaka|vomachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vomachatha|vomachatha]] || [[word:vomachaja|vomachaja]] || [[word:vomachasha|vomachasha]] || [[word:vomachaka|vomachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vomachafthaf|vomachafthaf]] || [[word:vomachafjaf|vomachafjaf]] || [[word:vomachafshaf|vomachafshaf]] || [[word:vomachafkaf|vomachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vomachasha|vomachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vomachshĂ«sha|vomachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vomachrosha|vomachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vomachmusha|vomachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vomachyasha|vomachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govomachnkshĂ«sha|govomachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govomachnkrosha|govomachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govomachnkmusha|govomachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govomachnkyasha|govomachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vomamachasha|vomamachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vomamachshĂ«sha|vomamachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vomamachrosha|vomamachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vomamachmusha|vomamachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vomamachyasha|vomamachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govomamachnkshĂ«sha|govomamachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govomamachnkrosha|govomamachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govomamachnkmusha|govomamachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govomamachnkyasha|govomamachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vemĂŠchasha|vemĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vemĂŠchshĂ«sha|vemĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vemĂŠchrosha|vemĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vemĂŠchmusha|vemĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vemĂŠchyasha|vemĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govemĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|govemĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govemĂŠchnkrosha|govemĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govemĂŠchnkmusha|govemĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govemĂŠchnkyasha|govemĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vomfachasha|vomfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vomfachshĂ«sha|vomfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vomfachrosha|vomfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vomfachmusha|vomfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vomfachyasha|vomfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govomfachnkshĂ«sha|govomfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govomfachnkrosha|govomfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govomfachnkmusha|govomfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govomfachnkyasha|govomfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
